mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stats_event ( occurred_at, event_type, preview_key, provider_id, http_status, cache_hit, duration_ms, client_type, error_code ) VALUES ( #{occurredAt}, #{eventType}, #{previewKey}, #{providerId}, #{httpStatus}, #{cacheHit}, #{durationMs}, #{clientType}, #{errorCode} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stats_link WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stats_event event WHERE event.preview_key = stats_link.preview_key )
